title: hieracium smolandicum subsp. pholidotum
intro: Hieracium smolandicum subsp. pholidotum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is also known as a type of hawkweed, which is a common name for plants in the Hieracium genus. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. As an herbal remedy, Hieracium smolandicum subsp. pholidotum is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, wound healing, and skin conditions.
